prompt: I have a prompt that generates technical diagrams but the quality is inconsistent. Some come out with garbled text, wrong colors. I want to systematically improve it. I have a Gemini API key and about 30 example topics. Can you help me set up an automated optimization loop?
assertions: Reads SKILL.md and follows the step-by-step procedure defined in it
Loads and validates config.yaml before attempting to run
Detects that evaluation criteria already exist in config.yaml and does NOT regenerate them
Asks the user how many cycles to run (or confirms before starting)
Provides the correct autoresearch.py command with --config config.yaml flag
